data.name: Demonic Rental 😈
data.detailed_description:
Debbie needed a break, and Rita, her friend from the clubs, stepped up and got her a weekend rental so she could get away for a few days. But there’s a secret waiting for Debbie that Rita hasn’t told her about. Will Debbie like the demonic surprise waiting? Will she handle it with delight or with despair?

Key Features

• Visual Novel about sexual adventures of girls with demonic creatures

• Exciting porn story written by a nymphomaniac woman

• Animated and 100% uncensored sex scenes of Girl fucked by Monster

• Full HD (1920x1080 pixels) resolution graphic

• Girl's and Monster's hot moans and the environmental ambiance sounds

• Name your characters to make this story your personal one

WISHLIST & FOLLOW FOR UPDATES!

Upcoming updates:

• LOVENSE sex toys support for unforgettable pleasure & satisfaction

• Translation into other languages ​​upon your requests, post your wishes on the game hub!

data.short_description: Debbie’s club friend Rita has helped her find the perfect weekend rental getaway. But she’s also got a surprise waiting for the worn-out Debbie, one the redheaded girl is not going to forget for the rest of her life! And exactly how long that is might not be as long as Debbie thinks!
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: Pentium® 4 1.5 GHz / Athlon®
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GPU capable of showing images and video
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX® 9 compatible

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.6
  • 處理器: Apple M1 or Intel Core M
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GPU capable of showing images and video
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX® 9 compatible

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+ or Kernel 3.x+ based distributions
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
